text: Some of this will be purely tax related. replies.author: @cristitanase6130
replies.text:
@TheDragon975 
What? What TDS dude? I'm anti-woke as hell, stop blabbering nonsense. 
The US Military press guy said "We do not put behind an error on our part" right after Israel said "Israel haven't targeted that area." 

Both declarations came after three days of denial followed by an independent investigation that proved the girl school was indeed targeted and hit by US or Israel missiles, killing 160 young girls.

Why did they did that? Because they used outdated maps, and since 2016 a new building appeared near the military base they wanted to target, a private clinic. Two maps shows the clinic, the third doesn't. Clearly they have not updated the maps, and as such the targeting data they used was wrong.

Besides the fact that the attack happened when people were in the streets not at midnight as Russia does to avoid civilian casualties, the White House reaction was of instant mockery, then denial of knowledge then admission of investigation then half-admission of guilt.


This comes on top of the secondary War Crime committed in just 4 days by the US, the sinking of without warning or a declaration of War of the Iranian Frigate that was sailing near India as it was invited by India to participate in an exercise, and it was not involved in any "War", being at 2000 miles away from the Gulf area.

The fact that that frigate had no sonar and no anti-submarine weapons and that was attacked without warning to surrender or to return to an Indian port for internship, shows the callousness of the Trump regime.

But what's worse is that instead of immediately aiding the drowning sailors as per Geneva Convention at Sea, the US Submarine filmed them dying.

Trump later bragged about this second War Crime at national television in front of the entire world.

To this day only two rules have forbidden their submarine commanders to help enemy sailors, Hitler and Trump, and no matter how much history may or may not distort things about Trump, this can never be erased from his record. He actually became what the libtards accused him to be: Literarily Hitler.


Again, the frigate was nowhere near any US military asset. Was not in the Gulf. Was not participating in any offensive or defensive operations. It was near Sri Lanka where it was invited by India to a joined exercise at sea that they participated not two days before US attacked Iran. 
The ship had no sonar and no anti-submarine weapons, and the US Submarine was in absolutely no danger at all times. 

Basically they butchered 160 young girls and 250 sailors because Trump decided overnight that the entire population of Iran (almost 100 million people) are guilty of existing outside his demented willpower. 

This is not TDS this is the reality and I never ever blamed Trump for anything until recently when he started killing, pirating and bombing left and right, Bush Jr. Obama style.

He betrayed our vote.
